search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: How to get airport lounge discounts By Andrea Bennett (Travel + Leisure) -- The foolproof way to gain entry to an airport lounge is to buy a first- or business-class ticket. But traveling coach doesn't mean you can't have the same access. Just because you're traveling coach, doesn't mean you can't wait for your flight in style. Lounge
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses airport lounge access and discounts, not strategies or information on improving athletic performance or sports skills.
